selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 33 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap provider witnesses where available, Chart No.1 parity crops where available, and actual batch-33 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: DAYSQR01 is square or rectangular daymark, simplified: S-57 object DAYMAR with S-52 instruction SY(DAYSQR01);TE('%s','OBJNAM',2,1,2,'15110',-1,-1,CHBLK,21), conditions TOPSHP19. DAYSQR01 is square or rectangular daymark, simplified. It is used as a square or rectangular daymark, simplified. Required geometry: exact topmark silhouette/count/orientation from the references. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct DAYMAR square/rectangular daymark class, square outline, stem, lower filled node cue, and S-101/source-priority magenta colour family; OpenCPN green raster is a provider style variance, not a class substitution. No final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta square/rectangular daymark outline on a stem with a filled lower node, removing the prior black/yellow generic board and preserving the required topmark shape.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
